details.test: Task 1 - Least reliable service added to Critical Watch watchlist
Task 2 - Fastest region set as preferred for service with regional performance data
Task 3 - Tag more reliable service between Security-critical and Billing Service
Task 4 - Schedule Index maintenance window for Database Cluster-like service
Task 5 - Create critical uptime alert rule for Payments API
Task 6 - Save high-impact incidents report for last 30 days
Task 7 - Pin least reliable Payments services below uptime threshold
Task 8 - Create Weekly uptime summary widget and reorder widget and services
